calendar.matters:
Supplemental Accounting And Petn. For Release Of Funds From Blocked Account And Order To Pay Outstanding Liabilities
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for and with Marie McKay. Thomas McKay in Propria Persona.

Mr. Lieberman stated that he had filed of all of the receipts except for Francine McKay's as she refused to sign. Counsel and Ms. McKay addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes, submitted bank statements reflecting ending balances in the accounts and a letter from Francine acknowledging that she received the Court ordered distribution. The Court authorized a withdrawal of $1,700.00 from the blocked account to pay the outstanding bond premium, (signing the order for the same in open court). Ms. McKay stated that she would make a distribution of $1,649.20 to be divided between Julius and James, a distribution of $1,649.20 to Thomas McKay and that she was willing to absorb the short fall. The matter was taken under submission as to the accounting issue and the short fall issue.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Off Calendar

Supplemental Accounting And Petn. For Release Of Funds From Blocked Account And Order To Pay Outstanding Liabilities
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Continued To Mar-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Gary Lieberman appearing for and with administrator Marie McKay. Counsel has filed a declaration of the administrator to address the issues. He has read Josephine's McKay's objection letter. Marie McKay has the ring with her in court. She agreed to pay the appraisal value plus the appraisal cost and lay that issue to rest. The ring is not included in the accounting. It will be included in the order for final distribution. At 11;23am, Ron Bisbee appeared by phone for Karla Hill. He has filed a Notice of Lien against Julius Curry's share. With no objection to the lien, Mr. Bisbee is excused. Francine McKay and Thomas McKay are both in court and they both made statements. Francine McKay's address is 2564 Marbourne, Baltimore, Maryland 21230. Josephine's address is 2807 Erdman Avenue, Baltimore, Maryland. Thomas McKay's address is 130 Bright Street, San Francisco, CA 94132. Francnine asked for copy of all documents that she is entitled to. Matter submitted. Mr. Lieberman will send copy of the judgemnt to all parties.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Continued To Jun-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Gary Lieberman appearing for and with administrator Marie Mckay. Some of the heirs are in court. They are here from Baltimore except Thomas Mckay. Procedural issues addressed. Counsel will get a Franchise Tax Board Certificate. Counsel is requesting for preliminary distribution up to 50%. Court will allow preliminary distribution up to 50% across the board. Balance will be distributed after all the issues are taken care of. Counsel's request for 75% of the statutory fee is submitted. Counsel has the certified Letters from Maryland for the deceased heir. Court agreed to hear brief statments form the heirs. Thomas Mckay, Francine Mckay and Josephine Mckay made statements. Matter is continued to 6/27. Court will allow the heirs to appear by phone in the future if it is necessary. Court will review the order for preliminary distribution before signing it.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

At 10:50am, Court signed order for preliminary distribution and allowing 50% statutory fees.

Petition For Order For Issuance Of Amended Letters Administration
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
